snippet.title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai |Varun,Mrunal,Pooja| In Cinemas 5th June
snippet.description:
🔥 Get ready to groove to the ultimate dance song of the year — Chunnari Chunnari - Let’s Go! 💃✨
From the much-awaited Bollywood entertainer Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, this electrifying track brings back the iconic 90s vibe with a fresh party twist! 🎶❤️

With peppy beats, colorful energy, and vocals that will make you hit repeat, this song is all set to rule your playlists and dance floors! 🕺🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Releasing In Cinemas Worldwide on 5th June 2026

Saari Raen Din
Saara Chaen Mera

Udti Jaaye Banke Patang,

Lehraaye Besharmi Se

Ke Ho Gi Tu Hai Mhaari Sajnaa.

snippet.title: Disclosure Day | Final Trailer
snippet.description:
Believe it when you see it. Get tickets now. Disclosure Day only in theaters June 12.
______
If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to eight billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

The show follows the journey of Xerxes Desai, who was tasked with reviving Tata Press but he ends up transforming the failing venture by pivoting to a totally new category, watches. Facing bureaucratic hurdles, market challenges, and personal sacrifices, Xerxes’ relentless pursuit of excellence and innovation culminates in the birth of iconic brands like Sonata and the revolutionary Titan Edge, eventually leading to his name becoming the gold standard of Indian ingenuity & resilience.
